title: wireframe-spec project-manifest.json
description: Per-project configuration: token + component vocabulary, grammar regex, scene-kind list, wireframe glob, output path. Authored by `wireframe-spec init` and hand-edited.

client.description: Project name (from package.json or root dir name).

state_enum.description: Allowed data-state-variants values. Defaults: default, selected, running, error, disabled, empty, collapsed, expanded, editing, saving, idle, loading, active, hover.

scene_kinds.description: Allowed data-scene-kind values. Defaults: product-screen, arch-diagram.

wireframe_glob.description: Glob (relative to project root) for HTML wireframes. Default: docs/planning/wireframes/*.html. Use **/*.html to include nested dirs.

output_spec.description: Relative path to extract output. Default: docs/planning/wireframes/spec.json.

vocab.description: Canonical component names (PascalCase) discovered from src/components/.

source_glob.description: Glob for component source files (e.g. src/components/**/*.tsx).

layout_components.description: Layout-only components (outside src/components/ui/) treated separately by matcher.

source_file.description: Relative path to the CSS file containing the :root token block.

source_block.description: CSS selector containing the token vars (default :root).

vars.description: List of --var names extracted from the source_block.

aliases.description: Map canonical role names (e.g. text-strong) to consumer var names (e.g. ink-strong) — #107 Stage1↔Stage2 token-name bridge. Values accept both `--prefixed` and bare forms.

element_id_regex.description: Regex every data-element-id must match. Default: ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*(__[a-z][a-z0-9-]*)*(-[a-z][a-z0-9-]*)*$

max_depth.description: Maximum nesting depth for element trees. Default: 3.
